Welcome Hannah Kaufman (new HR/Payroll, helping Jeni & Victoria). Review the condensed KPI miss chart and share with teams. Swag contest: first two shift leads text 812-267-8669 with the potatoes-to-sink gap answer (no GMs). Play the Etown G.O.A.T video (2079: two 100s + a 92).

June budget at bottom of the 2065 sheet (DoorDash + UberEats promos baked in) — name the daily target at huddle. Large Soda now 30c more than Regular (not 10c). Blackberry counter sign posted. Orientation Checklist with all new hires.
